description_for_human: Access Dynamics 365 Business Performance Analytics data through natural language DAX queries.
description_for_model: Tools provided by the Microsoft-hosted Business Performance Analytics (BPA) MCP server. Enables direct DAX query execution against the BPA Power BI dataset and schema discovery. Covers financial data across three business domains: Record-to-Report (general ledger, P&L, trial balance, period-close status), Procure-to-Pay (vendor invoices, AP aging, purchase orders, procurement categories), and Order-to-Cash (customer invoices, AR aging, revenue recognition). Use get_bpa_dataset_schema first to discover table and column names, then execute_dax_query to run targeted financial queries.

tools.name: get_bpa_dataset_schema
tools.description: Returns the full schema of the BPA Power BI dataset — all tables, columns, and their data types. Call this before constructing a DAX query to discover the correct table and column names. The schema covers Record-to-Report, Procure-to-Pay, and Order-to-Cash data marts.

tools.name: execute_dax_query
tools.description: Executes a DAX EVALUATE query against the BPA dataset and returns the result as a structured table. Use for P&L analysis, cash flow metrics, AR/AP aging, budget vs actuals variance, vendor performance, period-close status, and CFO KPI dashboards. Always retrieve the schema first with get_bpa_dataset_schema to ensure correct table and column references.
